findings.message: Domain events are initialized with empty event_id and timestamp. If emitters do not enrich these fields before publishing, auditability and causal tracing are incomplete.

Safety-critical nested objects default to null (prompt_envelope, moderation_result). Downstream consumers can dereference null or emit incomplete audit records unless every caller manually hydrates these fields.
ToolInvocation constructor accepts a mutable Dictionary default and assigns it directly. Confirm this does not introduce shared-state aliasing across instances in GDScript runtime.
